beginner.title: To Be: am / is / are
beginner.content:
📌 Khi nào dùng TO BE
Dùng am / is / are để nói về:
• Danh tính: I am Linh. He is a student.
• Trạng thái / cảm xúc: She is tired. They are happy. I am bored.
• Nghề nghiệp: He is a doctor. We are nurses.
• Tuổi tác: I am 20 years old. She is nine.
• Địa điểm: We are in Hanoi. The keys are on the table.
• Quốc tịch / nguồn gốc: They are Vietnamese. She is from Korea.
• Mô tả đặc điểm: The book is interesting. The weather is hot.
• Giá / số lượng: It is 50,000 VND. They are two kilos.
📐 Công thức đầy đủ
Chủ ngữKhẳng địnhPhủ địnhCâu hỏiRút gọn (+)Rút gọn (-)
Iamam notAm I…?I'mI'm not
You / We / Theyareare not / aren'tAre you…?You're / We're / They'reYou aren't
He / She / Itisis not / isn'tIs he…?He's / She's / It'sHe isn't
✅ Trả lời ngắn (Short answers)
Are you tired? – Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
Is she a teacher? – Yes, she is. / No, she isn't.
Are they students? – Yes, they are. / No, they aren't.
⚠️ Không được nói: ~~Yes, I'm.~~ → Phải nói: Yes, I am.
🔗 There is / There are
• There is + danh từ số ít: There is a pen on the desk.
• There are + danh từ số nhiều: There are three chairs in the room.
• Phủ định: There isn't a cat. / There aren't any students.
• Câu hỏi: Is there a bank near here? – Yes, there is.
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She am a nurse. → ✅ She is a nurse.
❌ They is from Japan. → ✅ They are from Japan.
❌ I are happy. → ✅ I am happy.
❌ He is doctor. → ✅ He is a doctor.
❌ Yes, I'm. → ✅ Yes, I am.
She is a doctor. She's not a nurse.Cô ấy là bác sĩ.
Are they students? – Yes, they are.Họ có phải là học sinh không?
There is a supermarket near my house.Có một siêu thị gần nhà tôi.

exercises.q: I am student. → Correct or Wrong?

exercises.exp: Short answer không được dùng rút gọn

exercises.q: He is doctor. → Correct or Wrong?
There ___ three books on the table.
There is many people here. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.ans: Wrong – correct: There are many people here

exercises.exp: There is → câu hỏi Is there

exercises.q: There ___ a dog in the garden.
There ___ five students in the room.
___ there any milk in the fridge?
There ___ not any chairs in the room.
My name ___ Minh and I ___ a student.
You and I ___ both tired after the trip.
The keys ___ on the table, not in my bag.

writing_prompts.vi: Giới thiệu bản thân (tên, tuổi, nghề nghiệp, quê quán)
writing_prompts.example: My name is Linh. I am 20 years old. I am a student. I am from Hanoi.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả gia đình của bạn (nghề nghiệp, tính cách)
writing_prompts.example: My family is small. My mother is a nurse. She is very kind. My father is a teacher.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả lớp học / trường học của bạn
writing_prompts.example: My school is in District 3. There are 30 students in my class. My teacher is very patient.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả người bạn thân của bạn (ngoại hình, tính cách)
writing_prompts.example: My best friend is Nam. He is tall and thin. He is very funny and friendly. We are classmates.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả căn phòng của bạn (đồ vật, vị trí)
writing_prompts.example: My room is small but nice. There is a desk near the window. There are many books on the shelf.

beginner.title: Present Simple: I do / I don't / Do I?
beginner.content:
📌 Khi nào dùng Present Simple
• Thói quen / hành động thường xuyên: I walk to school every day.
• Sự thật hiển nhiên / quy luật tự nhiên: The sun rises in the east.
• Lịch trình cố định (tàu, phim, giờ học): The train leaves at 7am.
• Sở thích, cảm xúc thường trực: She likes coffee. I hate spiders.
• Hướng dẫn / chỉ dẫn: First you open the app, then you click 'Start'.
🔑 Dấu hiệu: always, usually, often, sometimes, rarely, never, every day/week/month, on Mondays, twice a week
📐 Công thức
Loại câuI / You / We / TheyHe / She / It
Khẳng định (+)work / eat / goworks / eats / goes
Phủ định (-)don't + Vdoesn't + V (nguyên thể)
Câu hỏi (?)Do + S + V?Does + S + V?
Trả lời ngắnYes, I do. / No, I don't.Yes, she does. / No, she doesn't.
✏️ Quy tắc thêm -s / -es cho He/She/It
• Bình thường → thêm -s: work→works, eat→eats
• Tận cùng -s, -sh, -ch, -x, -z, -o → thêm -es: watch→watches, go→goes
• Tận cùng phụ âm + y → bỏ y thêm -ies: study→studies, carry→carries
• Tận cùng nguyên âm + y → chỉ thêm -s: play→plays, buy→buys
• Bất quy tắc: have→has, be→is
🚫 Stative Verbs – Không dùng với thì tiếp diễn
Các động từ trạng thái dùng Present Simple, KHÔNG dùng Present Continuous:
• Suy nghĩ: know, believe, think (= ý kiến), understand, remember, forget
• Cảm xúc: love, like, hate, want, need, prefer
• Giác quan: see, hear, smell, taste, feel (= trạng thái)
• Sở hữu: have (= sở hữu), belong, own, contain
❌ I am knowing → ✅ I know | ❌ She is having a car → ✅ She has a car
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She don't like coffee. → ✅ She doesn't like coffee.
❌ Does he works here? → ✅ Does he work here?
❌ He studys hard. → ✅ He studies hard.
❌ She have two brothers. → ✅ She has two brothers.
She studies English every morning.Cô ấy học tiếng Anh mỗi sáng.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius.Nước sôi ở 100 độ C.
The train leaves at 7am on Saturdays.Tàu khởi hành lúc 7h sáng thứ Bảy.

exercises.q: She always ___ her homework after school.
She don't like coffee. → Correct or Wrong?
Does he works here? → Correct or Wrong?
I am knowing the answer. → Correct or Wrong?
The film ___ at 8pm. Don't be late!
He studys very hard. → Correct or Wrong?
My father ___ (watch) the news every evening.
She ___ (try) her best in every test.

exercises.exp: Does it rain? – Yes, it does.

exercises.q: She ___ (teach) English at a primary school.
She ___ (carry) a heavy bag to school every day.

At school, he {{5}} very hard in every lesson. He {{6}} lunch with his classmates in the canteen. After school, he {{7}} football with his friends for an hour. My sister and I {{5}} the shopping bags. We always {{6}} some street food afterwards. My dad {{7}} pho and my mum {{8}} banh mi. After the market, we {{9}} home and {{10}} the housework together. Bees {{6}} pollen from flowers. Fish {{7}} through their gills. Whales {{8}} to the surface to breathe. Birds {{9}} south in winter to find warmer weather. The Moon {{10}} around the Earth roughly once a month. These {{11}} facts that scientists have known for centuries.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả thói quen hàng ngày của bạn
writing_prompts.example: I usually wake up at 6 o'clock. I eat breakfast and then go to school. I always study in the evening.

writing_prompts.vi: Nói về sở thích của bạn (thích / không thích làm gì)
writing_prompts.example: I love listening to music and playing sports. I don't like waking up early. I enjoy reading books on weekends.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về công việc hoặc việc học của bạn mỗi ngày
writing_prompts.example: I go to school every day. My class starts at 7 am and finishes at 11 am. I have lunch at school.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả thói quen cuối tuần của bạn
writing_prompts.example: On weekends, I usually sleep late. I sometimes meet my friends and we play football together. I often cook dinner for my family.

writing_prompts.vi: Nói về những điều bạn làm và không làm mỗi ngày
writing_prompts.example: I always drink water in the morning. I never eat fast food. I don't watch TV on weekdays because I study.

beginner.title: Present Continuous: I'm doing
beginner.content:
📌 Khi nào dùng Present Continuous
• Đang xảy ra ngay lúc nói: Look! It's raining.
• Kế hoạch tương lai gần đã sắp xếp cụ thể: I'm meeting Tom tonight.
• Xu hướng đang thay đổi trong giai đoạn hiện tại: Prices are rising. English is becoming more important.
• Phàn nàn (với always): He's always interrupting me! She's always losing her keys!
🔑 Dấu hiệu: now, right now, at the moment, look!, listen!, currently, today, tonight, this week/month/year
📐 Công thức
(+) S + am/is/are + V-ing
(-) S + am/is/are + not + V-ing
(?) Am/Is/Are + S + V-ing?
Trả lời ngắn: Yes, he is. / No, she isn't.
✏️ Quy tắc thêm -ing
• Bình thường → thêm -ing: work→working, eat→eating
• Tận cùng 1 nguyên âm + 1 phụ âm (trọng âm cuối) → nhân đôi phụ âm: run→running, swim→swimming, sit→sitting
• Tận cùng -e (không phát âm) → bỏ e + thêm -ing: make→making, have→having, write→writing
• Tận cùng -ie → đổi ie thành y + ing: die→dying, lie→lying, tie→tying
🚫 Stative Verbs – Không dùng với Continuous
Các động từ trạng thái KHÔNG dùng -ing:
• know, believe, understand, remember, forget, think (= ý kiến)
• love, like, hate, want, need, prefer, wish
• see, hear, smell, taste, feel (trạng thái)
• have (= sở hữu), own, belong, contain
❌ I am knowing | ❌ She is liking | ❌ I am having a car
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ I am runing. → ✅ I am running.
❌ She is knowing the answer. → ✅ She knows.
❌ I am not liking this film. → ✅ I don't like this film.
Look! The children are playing in the garden.Nhìn kìa! Các em đang chơi trong vườn.
I'm meeting my teacher tomorrow morning.Tôi sẽ gặp giáo viên vào sáng mai (đã sắp xếp).
He's always losing his keys!Anh ta lúc nào cũng làm mất chìa khóa!

He ___ (swim) in the pool at this moment.

exercises.exp: hai hành động đang diễn ra

exercises.q: They ___ (build) a new bridge near our school.

What ___ you ___ (wear) to the party tonight?

exercises.exp: Giai đoạn hiện tại → am staying

exercises.q: He ___ (get) better – he'll be fine soon.
My brother ___ (prepare) for his university entrance exam this month.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả bạn đang làm gì lúc này
writing_prompts.example: Right now, I am sitting at my desk. I am studying English and listening to music at the same time.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một bức ảnh (người trong ảnh đang làm gì)
writing_prompts.example: In the picture, a boy is standing in the park. He is wearing a blue shirt and holding a ball. He is smiling.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả những gì đang xảy ra ngoài cửa sổ của bạn
writing_prompts.example: Outside my window, some children are playing in the park. A woman is walking her dog. It is not raining today.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về kế hoạch đang được sắp xếp cho tuần này
writing_prompts.example: I am meeting my friends on Saturday. My cousin is coming to visit us this week. We are planning a small party.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả gia đình bạn đang làm gì tối nay
writing_prompts.example: Tonight, my mother is cooking dinner in the kitchen. My father is watching TV. My sister and I are doing our homework together.

beginner.title: Present Simple vs Present Continuous
beginner.content:
📌 Khi nào dùng Present Simple vs Present Continuous
Present Simple ✅Present Continuous ✅
Thói quen, thường xuyên
She walks to school every day.		Đang xảy ra ngay lúc nói
She is walking to school now.
Sự thật hiển nhiên
Water boils at 100°C.		Xu hướng tạm thời
Prices are rising this year.
Cảm xúc/trạng thái (stative verbs)
I love this song.		Kế hoạch tương lai đã sắp xếp
We are meeting them tonight.
Lịch trình cố định
The train leaves at 7am.		Phàn nàn (với always)
He's always losing his keys!
🚫 Stative verbs – KHÔNG dùng với continuous
Các động từ trạng thái không dùng với Present Continuous:
• Cảm xúc/sở thích: love, like, hate, want, need, prefer
• Nhận thức: know, understand, believe, remember, forget, think (= believe)
• Giác quan: see, hear, smell, taste, feel (= have an opinion)
• Sở hữu: have (= own), own, belong, contain
❌ I am knowing the answer. → ✅ I know the answer.
❌ She is loving pizza. → ✅ She loves pizza.
❌ He is having a car. → ✅ He has a car. (= sở hữu)
🔑 Từ tín hiệu nhận biết
Present Simple: always, usually, often, sometimes, rarely, never, every day/week/year, on Mondays
Present Continuous: now, right now, at the moment, currently, today, this week, look!, listen!
⚠️ think, see, smell, taste, feel có thể dùng cả hai nhưng nghĩa khác:
• I think he's right. (= I believe) vs I am thinking about you. (= đang suy nghĩ)
• The soup smells good. (= mùi) vs She is smelling the flowers. (= đang ngửi)
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ I am going to school every day. → ✅ I go to school every day.
❌ She knows the answer right now? No — correct. → ✅ She knows (stative — no continuous)
❌ Look! He runs! → ✅ Look! He is running!
❌ I am wanting a coffee. → ✅ I want a coffee.
I usually walk to work, but today I am taking the bus.Tôi thường đi bộ, nhưng hôm nay tôi đang đi xe buýt.
She knows French very well. She is learning Spanish right now.Cô ấy biết tiếng Pháp rất giỏi và đang học tiếng Tây Ban Nha.
What are you doing? – I am cooking dinner. I always cook on Fridays.Bạn đang làm gì? – Tôi đang nấu ăn. Tôi luôn nấu ăn vào thứ Sáu.

exercises.q: Every morning she ___ to school by bike.
exercises.exp: Thói quen hàng ngày → Present Simple
Đang xảy ra ngay lúc nói → Present Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ pizza. It's my favourite food.
exercises.exp: love = stative verb → không dùng continuous

exercises.q: She ___ a book right now. She can't talk.

exercises.exp: Sự thật hiển nhiên → Present Simple

exercises.q: Look! The cat ___ on the sofa again.
exercises.exp: Look! → đang xảy ra → Present Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ what you mean. Don't worry.
They ___ dinner at a restaurant tonight. (It's planned.)
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã sắp xếp → Present Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ to the gym three times a week.
exercises.exp: Three times a week → thói quen → Present Simple

exercises.q: This coffee ___ strange. What's in it?

exercises.exp: Cầu khiến → đang xảy ra → Present Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ her homework at the moment.

exercises.exp: Quy luật tự nhiên → Present Simple

exercises.q: I think she ___ the bus to work this week because her car is broken.
exercises.exp: This week, tạm thời → Present Continuous

exercises.q: Do you know where my keys ___?
He's always ___ my things without asking!
exercises.exp: He's always + V-ing = phàn nàn → Continuous

exercises.q: She is knowing the answer. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.exp: know = stative verb, không dùng continuous

exercises.q: I usually eat breakfast at 7am. → Correct or Wrong?
Look! They play football in the garden. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.ans: Wrong – correct: They are playing football in the garden
exercises.exp: Look! → đang xảy ra → Present Continuous

exercises.q: He is having a nice car. → Correct or Wrong?
exercises.ans: Wrong – correct: He has a nice car

exercises.q: I ___ (walk) to school every day, but today I ___ (take) the bus.
exercises.exp: Thói quen vs đang xảy ra hôm nay

exercises.q: They ___ (play) tennis at the moment. Come back later.
The sun ___ (rise) in the east. That's a fact.
exercises.exp: Sự thật hiển nhiên → Present Simple

exercises.q: He ___ (not/like) horror movies. He prefers comedies.
We ___ (visit) our grandparents next Sunday. (It's arranged.)
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã sắp xếp → Present Continuous

exercises.q: This food ___ (smell) amazing! What is it?
She ___ (study) English every evening from 7 to 9.
exercises.exp: Every evening → thói quen → Present Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (think) about going to Canada for my holidays.
He usually ___ (get) up at 6, but this week he ___ (work) night shifts.
exercises.exp: Thói quen vs tình huống tạm thời

exercises.q: The baby ___ (sleep) right now. Please be quiet!
What ___ you ___ (do) this evening? – I ___ (meet) a friend.
He ___ (always/lose) his phone. It's so annoying!

exercises.exp: Sự thật hiển nhiên → Present Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (feel) tired today. I need some rest.

reorder.words: She usually walks to school but today she is taking the bus
I love this song it is my favourite
Look they are playing football in the garden
He goes to the gym three times a week
She is reading a book right now she cannot talk
Water boils at one hundred degrees and that is a fact
Listen someone is knocking at the door
He does not like horror movies he prefers comedies
We are visiting our grandparents next Sunday
I do not understand why she is always losing her keys
The baby is sleeping right now please be quiet
She studies English every evening from seven to nine
This soup smells amazing what is in it
He is always taking my things without asking
I am thinking about going to Canada for my holidays
The sun rises in the east every morning
What are you doing this evening I am meeting a friend
He usually gets up at six but this week he is working night shifts
Dolphins live in the ocean and they are very intelligent
I feel tired today because I did not sleep well last night

passage.text: It's Saturday morning in the Chen family's house. Mrs Chen {{1}} (cook) breakfast in the kitchen right now. She always {{2}} (make) pancakes on Saturdays. Mr Chen {{3}} (read) the newspaper at the kitchen table. He {{4}} (read) it every morning. Their daughter Mei {{5}} (listen) to music in her room. She {{6}} (love) pop music. Their son {{7}} (practise) his football skills in the garden. He {{8}} (train) twice a week normally, but this weekend he {{9}} (prepare) for a big match next week. The family dog {{10}} (bark) at the neighbours' cat outside. Everyone {{11}} (enjoy) their Saturday morning routine.

My friend Kai is an interesting person. He {{1}} (work) as a graphic designer and usually {{2}} (start) work at nine. But this week he {{3}} (work) from home because his office {{4}} (renovate). Right now it {{5}} (rain) heavily, so he {{6}} (sit) by the window and {{7}} (sketch) ideas for a new project. He {{8}} (drink) three cups of coffee a day — it's a habit. At the moment he {{9}} (listen) to jazz music while he {{10}} (design) a logo. He {{11}} (not/understand) why some clients keep changing their minds.

The school science fair {{1}} (take place) every year in June. This year, students {{2}} (work) on some very creative projects. Right now, class 7B {{3}} (present) their robot to the judges. The robot {{4}} (look) quite small but it {{5}} (do) three different tasks at once. The judges {{6}} (watch) carefully and {{7}} (take) notes. Mr Phong, the science teacher, {{8}} (believe) his students can win. He always {{9}} (say) that curiosity {{10}} (make) the best scientists. One student {{11}} (explain) her project nervously while her partner {{12}} (show) the demonstration.

Anna {{1}} (live) in London but she {{2}} (spend) this month in Paris for a French course. She usually {{3}} (speak) English at home, but right now she {{4}} (try) to use only French. At the moment she {{5}} (walk) along the Seine and {{6}} (enjoy) the beautiful view. She {{7}} (take) photos with her phone every few minutes. She {{8}} (not/know) many French words yet, but she {{9}} (learn) fast. She {{10}} (understand) more every day. Back home, her cat {{11}} (miss) her. Her flatmate {{12}} (look after) it while she {{13}} (study) abroad.

The restaurant 'Green Fork' {{1}} (open) every day except Monday. Tonight it {{2}} (get) very busy. The chef {{3}} (prepare) a special dish that only {{4}} (appear) on the menu on Fridays. The waiters {{5}} (rush) around taking orders. At table six, a couple {{6}} (celebrate) their anniversary. They {{7}} (look) very happy. A food blogger {{8}} (sit) in the corner and {{9}} (write) a review on her phone. She often {{10}} (visit) new restaurants for her column. Right now she {{11}} (taste) the soup and {{12}} (think) it's the best she's ever had. The manager {{13}} (watch) everything carefully to make sure everyone {{14}} (have) a good time.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh thói quen hàng ngày và hoạt động đang xảy ra ngay lúc này của bạn.
writing_prompts.example: I usually wake up at 6am, but today I am sleeping in. I always have breakfast, but right now I am just drinking coffee. Normally I walk to school, but this morning I am taking the bus because it is raining.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một người bạn bè hoặc thành viên gia đình: thói quen của họ (Present Simple) và những gì họ đang làm bây giờ (Present Continuous).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Simple for habits, Present Continuous for now
writing_prompts.example: My brother usually studies in the evenings and plays football at weekends. He loves action films but doesn't like romance. Right now he is sitting in his room and is chatting with his friends online.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết 5 câu dùng stative verbs (know, love, want, understand, have) đúng cách.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Stative verbs — always use Present Simple
writing_prompts.example: I know the answer to this question. She loves spending time with her family. We want to travel to Japan someday. He has a big house near the city. I don't understand why they are angry.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn văn ngắn về một buổi sáng bận rộn trong gia đình bạn.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mix of Present Simple (routines) and Present Continuous (current actions)
writing_prompts.example: Every morning our house is very busy. My mum always makes breakfast at 7am. My dad usually reads the news before work. Right now, my little sister is getting dressed and my brother is packing his bag. I always leave for school at 7:30, but today I am waiting for my friend.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về những gì đang xảy ra ở nơi bạn đang ngồi bây giờ. Dùng cả Present Simple (mô tả sự thật) và Present Continuous (đang xảy ra).
writing_prompts.example: I am sitting in a café right now. The café is usually quiet but today it is very busy. The barista is making coffee and the customers are talking loudly. Outside it is raining. I usually study at home, but today I am working here because I like the atmosphere.
